summary: Market research complete — identified collectible retro handheld as optimal niche

details.keyInsight: Oversaturated at budget end, underserved at premium/collectible tier
comparables: Miyoo Mini (sells out on every restock)
details.recommendation: Minimal collectible retro handheld, design-first, numbered limited run

summary: Product decided: Game Boy Micro-sized collectible retro handheld, 10-20 numbered units, AI-designed

details.differentiator: AI-designed, numbered, ships with design lineage card
details.notCompeting: Not a Steam Deck competitor — a design statement and art object
